title: Red Shiny Dusknoir
description: Replaces Dusknoir's shiny with one that fits more with Duskull and Dusclops' shiny forms
body: Although the muted blue color of Dusknoir's shiny looks nice, it clashes greatly with the color of Duskull and Dusclops' shiny forms. With this pack, you can now keep the red color scheme when you evolve your shiny Dusclops into a Dusknoir.
